name: listing_id
description: Unique listing identifier from Booli.se scraping system

name: url
description: Direct URL to the property listing on Booli.se

name: scraped_at
description: Exact timestamp when the listing was scraped from Booli.se

name: scraped_at_date
description: Date partition key extracted from scraped_at timestamp for BigQuery optimization

name: listing_price
description: Original asking price when the property was first listed, in Swedish Kronor (SEK)

name: sold_price
description: Final sale price achieved when the property was sold, in Swedish Kronor (SEK)

name: address
description: Full street address of the property including street name and number

name: area
description: Standardized neighborhood/area name (cleaned and normalized from area_original)

name: area_original
description: Original area name as scraped from Booli.se before standardization

name: municipality
description: Swedish municipality name where the property is located (e.g., Stockholm, Solna)

name: latitude
description: Listing latitude when the source provides coordinates

name: longitude
description: Listing longitude when the source provides coordinates

name: living_area
description: Total living area of the property in square meters (excluding balcony, storage, etc.)

name: rooms
description: Total number of rooms in the property (including bedrooms, living room, kitchen, etc.)

name: property_type
description: Type of property (e.g., 'Lägenhet' for apartment, 'Villa' for house, 'Radhus' for townhouse)

name: construction_year
description: Year when the property was originally constructed or built

name: monthly_fee
description: Monthly housing association fee (avgift) in Swedish Kronor (SEK)

name: price_per_sqm
description: Calculated price per square meter based on listing price divided by living area

name: floor
description: Floor number where the apartment is located (ground floor = 0, first floor = 1, etc.)

name: elevator
description: Boolean indicating whether the building has an elevator

name: balcony
description: Boolean indicating whether the apartment has a balcony

name: sold_date
description: Date when the property was sold (completion date)

name: days_on_market
description: Number of days the property was listed before being sold

name: price_change
description: Price difference between sold price and listing price in Swedish Kronor (SEK)

name: description
description: Full text description of the property from the listing

name: images
description: Array of image URLs from the property listing

name: source_page
description: URL of the Booli.se search page where this listing was found
